clean_cooking_access_framing.model_use: Firewood collection burden and women/children exposure motivate fuel collection and health proxy fields.

clean_at_point_of_use: biomass stoves meeting WHO emission targets
fuel_health_framing.source: WHO household air pollution fact sheet, https://www.who.int/news-room/fact-sheets/detail/household-air-pollution-and-health

kenya_indicator_anchor.indicator: World Bank EG.CFT.ACCS.ZS, access to clean fuels and technologies for cooking (% of population), Kenya

location_context.household_size_anchor: Kajiado County 2019 census context reports about 316,179 households and 1,117,840 people, implying roughly 3.5 people per household.

synthetic_data_notice: These are generated personas for hackathon planning and are not real Oloika resident records.
